title: ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
